MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home

  • Release Notes
AVCapture2 C++

It demonstrates how to use universal APIs to:

  1. capture and preview videos using Universal Functions;
  2. capture and preview audios using Universal Functions.

Compared with AVCapture, this example is compatible with all capture devices, and supports to choose videos and audios separately.

Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\VC++\GUI\AVCapture2

Supported Hardware

All the Magewell capture device, including Pro/Eco/USB Gen2/Plus Family

Features

  1. Preview audio and video while capturing.
  2. Select capture and audio channel separately.

Workflow

  1. To initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To open the first detected available channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath
  3. To get video status, call: MWGetVideoSignalStatus
  4. To create a video capture and render, call: MWCreateVideoCapture, MWDXRender
  5. To create an audio capture and render, call: MWCreateAudioCapture, CDSoundRenderer
  6. Enter the main thread.

  7. To re-create a capture task when the captured device changed:

    1. To close the capture task and the channel, call: MWDestoryVideoCapture, MWDestoryAudioCapture, MWCloseChannel
    2. To enumerate the audio of the captured video channel.
    3. To re-open the chosen audio channel, go to the step 3 to 7.

  8. To re-create a capture task when the audio channel changed:

    1. To close the captured channel, call: MWDestoryVideoCapture, MWDestoryAudioCapture, MWCloseChannel
    2. Reset input audio type and choose an audio channel.
    3. Re-open the audio channel according to the specified audio type, go to step 3 to 7.
  9. To free up system resources and memory after exiting the capture application, call: MWCloseChannel and MWCaptureExitInstance

Flow Chart

Figure 1 AVCapture2
